Hardware Component File

UPATransversal V1.8_TTE

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference UPA_Transversal_V1.8_tte_20120105T142543.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 74E
Receive ID 76E
Functional Addr 0E
Functional Name Aide au parking
